name: path-boost
description: Path-locality boost normalization (S5): three memories written from different cwds (LOCAL proj-nova/lib, GENERIC home root, FOREIGN proj-vega/lib), all promoted to the per-fixture global store, LOCAL's local copy forgotten so competitors are symmetric bm25-only global rows. q1 (from LOCAL's cwd) pins that a cwd-local memory outranks a generic home-root memory holding a slight lexical edge; q2 (from a third cwd) pins that the generic memory cannot outrank the topically better match. Red under the pre-1.26.4 memory-count normalization; green under the max-side normalization. See docs/plans/2026-07-18-s5-path-overlap-tuning.md.
